description.unified: Upon activation, takes up a stance and starts casting. After casting ends, deals ??? P.DMG upon enemies in a straight line. DMG is increased by 150% in proportion to the total casting time. If casting progresses beyond the 3rd stage, knock over enemies.
Target receives 50% increased damage from this hero. In addition, own ATK is increased by ???.
Fires 10 shots at random. Deals ??? DMG upon attack, and per each attack, DMG is increased by 10%.
Every 10 sec, attacks the target 2 times, dealing a total of ??? P.DMG.

IV.unified: Crit DMG is increased by [60%->50%] for the duration of skill.

light.unified: ATK Spd is boosted by [15%->250] for the duration.
Increases Mana Cost by [1000->1] and the number of targets by 1.

dark.unified: Enemies hit are stunned for [1.2 sec->2 sec].

description.unified: [Penetration Shot] Takes [(added) 40%] reduced P.DMG and M.DMG for the skill's duration, and upon Critical Hit, increases own ATK by {0}% for 10 sec. ATK increase can be stacked up to max [2->4] times.
[Target Aim] Changes the target to a random enemy when Rodina's target dies, increasing ATK by {0}% for 10 sec.
[Focus Fire] Increased DMG by {0}% and inflicts damage ingnoring the target's DEF with the last 2 shots.
[Consecutive Shot] Changes the number of targets to 2. Hit enemies have their P.Crit Resistance reduced by {0} for 10 sec.
Each attack has a 20% chance of dealing {0}% of ATK as extra P.DMG and knocking back the enemy. Afterwards, ACC is increased by 100 for 10 sec. This effect can be stacked up to 3 times max.

Summons the soul of Rodina Custom Rifle Mod.0, increasing own Crit DMG by [70%->100%] for 10 sec. For the duration of Skill, deals ??? P.DMG that ignores DEF every 2 sec and inflicts Stun on the hit target for [1 sec->2 sec]. If the target is a Boss, the DMG and duration of Stun increases by [2%->2 times].

2.from: Becomes immune to CC for 5 sec.
2.to: Increases DMG by 50% and gains immunity to CC for the duration of Skill.
